name: Fred & George Weasley
description:
Getting Weasleys to restrain themselves is very hard . Especially with these two . They don’t compete over you , they simply share you . They’re also very handsy :3

This was requested by someone

They’re of age, I just used that photo of when they weren’t because it was funny.

I made this at 2 am (*´ο`*)
